afterSnapshot.name: ROUTE_PRESSURE_DROP_HPA
afterSnapshot.description: Hour-over-hour pressure fall (hPa) at or above which a leg is flagged for a pressure drop nearby.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: A rapid pressure fall signals deteriorating weather even if the absolute value is normal.
implementation: A 3 hPa drop within an hour is a meaningful indicator of an approaching system.
